prompt: A high-end photorealistic lifestyle shot of a premium bar counter. In the foreground, a crystal glass of red wine and a gourmet plate of appetizers sit on a polished warm wood surface with integrated amber light strips. A smartphone is held in a natural position, its screen glowing with a soft teal and blue holographic interface showing nutrition data. Subtle cyberpunk aesthetic with thin neon teal light trails and floating digital particles around the food. Soft bokeh background of a futuristic dim-lit bar. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, sophisticated atmosphere, vertical composition.
negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, letters, words, distorted hands, extra fingers, messy table, cheap furniture, bright daylight, cartoon, 3d render, low quality, blurry face, qr code
notes: Combined the 'bar/wine' theme from the post text with the brand's signature 'neon/tech' aesthetic.
Used 'warm wood' and 'amber light strips' to maintain the premium lifestyle feel from main_menu.png.
Incorporated the teal/blue glow for the UI elements to match ref_stats.png and ref_shopping_mode.png.
Focused on a first-person or over-the-shoulder perspective to emphasize the 'Snap -> Send' utility mentioned in the text.
